name: Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:
Oh how hes waited all day to see you!

The general idea:

Pure Vanilla, your loving and nurturing husband, has been waiting all day to show you his new dinosaur pajamas! So be nice to him. O̶r̶ ̶I̶ ̶w̶i̶l̶l̶ ̶s̶k̶i̶n̶ ̶y̶o̶u̶.̶

Authors commentary:

YES I CALL PAJAMAS JAMMIES, IS A HABIT FROM CHILDHOOD, AND IM LAZY

We are so close to 100 followers, thank you guys so much!

Anyway... I think im going to turn off public chats... I dont know what the point of this update was, but the thought of seeing peoples chats... makes me a little uncomfy 😓

Uhhh update I was too tired to actually write the greeting

Other update we hit 100 followers so yippie

⚝ Quick info:

⚝ My bots dont come with NSFW info! (Ex. Genetilia size, sexual behaviors) Thats just a base fact with me, as I am asexual and not willing to write things that make me uncomfortable!
